nasb.text: But You, O God, will bring them down to the pit of destruction; Men of bloodshed and deceit will not live out half their days. But I will trust in You.

esv.text: But you, O God, will cast them down into the pit of destruction; men of blood and treachery shall not live out half their days. But I will trust in you.

cnv.text: 神啊！你必使惡人墮入滅亡的深坑裡； 流人血和行詭詐的人必活不到半世； 至於我，我必倚靠你。

ccb.text: 上帝啊， 你必把恶人送进灭亡的坑里。 嗜血成性的骗子必早早夭亡。 但我要信靠你。

csbs.text: 神哪，你必使恶人下到灭亡的深坑里！ 那些杀人流血、行诡诈的人，必活不过半生； 至于我，我要依靠你。
